# omni_kubernetes_manifest (Resource)

Manages a group of Kubernetes manifests (a KubernetesManifestGroup) that Omni applies to a cluster.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "omni_cluster" "example" {
  name               = "example"
  kubernetes_version = "1.36.2"
  talos_version      = "1.13.5"
}

resource "omni_kubernetes_manifest" "namespace" {
  name    = "team-namespace"
  weight  = 400
  mode    = "full"
  cluster = omni_cluster.example.name

  data = yamlencode({
    apiVersion = "v1"
    kind       = "Namespace"
    metadata = {
      name = "team"
    }
  })
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `cluster` (String) The cluster to apply the manifests to. Immutable.
- `data` (String) The Kubernetes manifests to apply, as YAML (may contain multiple `---`-separated documents).
- `mode` (String) How Omni applies the manifests. One of: full, one-time.
- `name` (String) The manifest group name, used together with the weight to form the resource ID. Immutable.

### Optional

- `weight` (Number) The manifest weight. Lower-weight groups are applied first. Defaults to 400. Changing the weight changes the resource ID and replaces the manifest group.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The generated manifest group ID, composed as `<zero-padded weight>-<cluster>-<name>`.
